creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 187666
port options

The fonts in the UI have gone missing since around 55. Found out this only happens when _anything_ is specified in "gtk-font-name", for example:

gtk-font-name="Ubuntu Light 10"

Affected OS version: at least 11.1-RELEASE through 11.1-RELEASE-p2.
